slides.headline: Spotting a Chapter 31 Scenario Quickly
slides.body: Understand key signals to streamline compliance.

slides.headline: Look for 'Post-9/11 GI Bill'
slides.body: Check if the student's Certificate of Eligibility (COE) indicates the Post-9/11 GI Bill.
bullets: COE must specify Post-9/11 GI Bill

slides.headline: Check for 'Eligible for Vocational Rehabilitation and Training (VR&T)'
slides.body: Confirm if the student is marked as eligible for VR&T in the Chapter 31 scenario.
bullets: Search for 'VR&T' in the student's COE
Refer to your SAA letter for guidance

slides.headline: Identify 'Eligibility for Vocational Rehabilitation and Training (VR&T)'
slides.body: Verify if the student is eligible for VR&T under Chapter 31.
bullets: Refer to your SAA letter for eligibility criteria

slides.headline: Confirm 'Vocational Rehabilitation and Training (VR&T)' Eligibility
slides.body: Ensure the student meets the criteria for VR&T under Chapter 31.
bullets: Refer to your SAA letter for specific requirements

slides.headline: Review 'Chapter 31' Eligibility
slides.body: Review the student's eligibility for Chapter 31 under the Post-9/11 GI Bill.
bullets: Refer to your SAA letter for Chapter 31 requirements

slides.body: Learn more about Chapter 31 compliance. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Understand key signals to streamline compliance. Spotting a Chapter 31 scenario quickly ensures you're in compliance. Learn more in our carousel and stay ahead of the curve. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more concise headline to ensure it stands out as clearly as the others.
